title: ctenitis aciculata
intro: Ctenitis aciculata is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the forked shield fern. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ctenitis aciculata include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce inflammation, fight infections, and protect against cell damage. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture, with its extracts being used in traditional medicine and modern supplements.
